25:15 â June 30, 2025
Update to the Payment Services Class A Fee Schedule, Form 2725
We updated the Payment Services Class A Fee Schedule, Form 2725, as described below.
The Payment Services Class A Fee Schedule, Form 2725, is available to BC and Ontario Class A credit unions only.
Document Library
Status
Payment Services Class A Fee Schedule
2725
Section 4.1, Debit Operations Fee
We added the PRM Debit Channel Fraud Monitoring Service fee, which is a passthrough fee from Everlink. Affected clients were notified in April.
